info.title: QRL JSON-RPC API
info.description: This is the documentation for the QRL JSON-RPC API

post.description: Returns the number of the most recent block.

200.description: Block number response

post.description: Returns chain id.

200.description: Chain ID response

post.description: Returns the sync status of the node.

200.description: Sync status of the node

post.description: Returns an estimate of the current price per gas in planck.

200.description: Estimate of the current price per gas

post.description: Returns list of accounts owned by the client.

200.description: Array of addresses (20 bytes each) owned by the client.

post.description: Returns the balance of the account at a given address.

200.description: Balance of the account at a given address

post.summary: Get Value of a Storage Position
post.description: Returns the value from a storage position at a given address.

200.description: Value from a storage position at a given address.

post.description: Returns the number of transactions sent from an address.

200.description: Number of transaction sent from the address

post.summary: Get Number of Block Transaction By Hash
post.description: Returns the number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block hash.

200.description: Number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block hash

post.summary: Get Number of Block Transaction By Number
post.description: Returns the number of transactions in a block matching the given block number.

200.description: Number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block hash

post.description: Returns code at a given address.

200.description: Code at the given address

post.description: Sign the given message. The address to sign with must be unlocked.

200.description: Signature of the message

post.description: Signs a transaction that can be submitted to the network at a later time using qrl_sendRawTransaction.

200.description: Raw RLP-encoded transaction object along with detailed transaction data

post.description: Signs a transaction and broadcast to the network.

200.description: Transaction hash

post.summary: Sign and Broadcast Transaction (Using RLP-Encoded Data)
post.description: Signs a transaction (using RLP-encoded transaction data) and broadcast to the network.

200.description: Transaction hash

post.description: Call specified contract function

200.description: Return value of executed contract function

post.description: Generates and returns an estimate of how much gas is necessary to allow the transaction to complete.

200.description: Gas estimate for the transaction

post.description: Returns block matching the given block hash.

200.description: Block matching given block hash

post.description: Returns block matching the given block number.

200.description: Block matching given block number

post.description: Returns transaction object matching the given transaction hash.

200.description: Transaction object matching given transaction hash

post.summary: Get Transaction By Block Hash and Transaction Index
post.description: Returns transaction object matching the given block hash and transaction index position.

200.description: Transaction object matching given block hash and transaction index position

post.summary: Get Transaction By Block Number and Transaction Index
post.description: Returns transaction object matching the given block number and transaction index position.

200.description: Transaction object matching given block number and transaction index position

post.description: Returns the receipt of a transaction by transaction hash.

200.description: Transaction receipt

post.description: Creates a filter object, based on filter options, to notify when the state changes (logs).

200.description: Filter id

post.description: Creates a filter in the node, to notify when a new block arrives.

200.description: Filter id

post.description: Creates a filter in the node, to notify when new pending transactions arrive.

200.description: Filter id

post.description: Uninstalls a filter with given id.

200.description: Boolean - true if the filter was successfully uninstalled, otherwise false.

post.description: Polling method for a filter, which returns an array of logs which occurred since last poll.

200.description: Array of log objects, or an empty array if nothing has changed since last poll.

post.description: Returns an array of all logs matching filter with given id.

200.description: Array of log objects

post.description: Returns an array of all logs matching a given filter object.

200.description: Array of log objects

post.description: Get the priority fee needed to be included in a block.

200.description: Priority fee needed to be included in a block.

post.description: Returns a block header by matching block number.

200.description: Block header

post.description: Returns a block header by matching block hash.

200.description: Block header

post.description: Returns list of pending transactions.

200.description: List of pending transactions

post.summary: Get Transactions Receipts in a Block
post.description: Returns all transaction receipts for a given block.

200.description: List of transaction receipts in a given block

post.description: Fill in default values for transaction object

200.description: Filled transaction and its RLP encoded form

post.description: Returns the Merkle proof for a given account and optionally some storage keys.

200.description: Merkle proof for the given account

post.description: Generates an access list for a transaction.

200.description: Access list and gas used for the transaction

post.description: Returns transaction base fee per gas and effective priority fee per gas for the requested block range.

200.description: Fee history for the returned block range.

result.description: Estimate of the current gas price

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"
Position of the storage inside contract
Block number in hex or one of "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the QRL contract address, the second item is the position of storage inside contract, and the third item is block identifier

result.description: Value from a storage position at a given address.

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is QRL address and the second item is block identifier

result.description: Number of transaction sent from the address

params.description: Block hash

result.description: Number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block hash

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of these keywords "earliest", "latest", "safe", "finalized", and "pending"

params.description: Block number in hex or one of these keywords "earliest", "latest", "safe", "finalized", and "pending"

result.description: Number of transactions in a block from a block matching the given block number

params.description: Params array where the first is the contract address and the second is the block identifier

oneOf.description: QRL address that has been unlocked

params.description: Params array where the first is the QRL address that has been unlocked and the second is the message to be signed

data.description: Optional extra information or payload included with the transaction.

from.description: The address the transaction is sent from.

gas.description: Integer of the gas provided for the transaction execution.

gasPrice.description: Integer of the gasPrice used for each paid gas.

to.description: The address the transaction is directed to.

value.description: Integer of the value sent with this transaction.

maxFeePerGas.description: Max total fee per gas unit you’re willing to pay.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: Tip per gas unit to prioritize your transaction.

params.description: Transaction data

raw.description: The fully signed transaction, RLP-encoded hex string ready for broadcast

publicKey.description: Public key used to sign the transaction

data.description: Optional extra information or payload included with the transaction.

from.description: The address the transaction is sent from.

gas.description: Integer of the gas provided for the transaction execution.

gasPrice.description: Integer of the gasPrice used for each paid gas.

to.description: The address the transaction is directed to.

value.description: Integer of the value sent with this transaction.

maxFeePerGas.description: Max total fee per gas unit you’re willing to pay.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: Tip per gas unit to prioritize your transaction.

params.description: Transaction data
RLP-encoded transaction data

data.description: Optional, AkBI-encoded function signature with its arguments

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the contract function call data and the second item is block identifier.

result.description: Return value of executed contract function

to.description: Optional, contract address/recipient address, empty for contract deployment

data.description: Optional, ABI-encoded function signature with its arguments. Empty for qrl transfer

value.description: Optional, input for contract call function or qrl transfer value

params.description: Params array where the first item is the transaction data.

oneOf.description: If true it returns the full transaction objects inside the block, if false only the hashes of the transactions.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block hash and the second item is boolean argument whether to return full transaction objects or only transaction hashes

oneOf.description: Integer of the block number, or the string "earliest", "latest", "pending", "safe" or "finalized"
If true it returns the full transaction objects inside the block, if false only the hashes of the transactions.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block number and the second item is boolean argument whether to return full transaction objects or only transaction hashes
Params array where the first item is the transaction hash.
Params array where the first item is the block hash and the second item is transaction index position.

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block number and the second item is transaction index position.
Params array where the first item is the transaction hash.

oneOf.description: Filter options. For fromBlock and toBlock field, it supports block number in hex and also one of these keywords "earliest", "latest", "safe", and "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the filter options.
Params array where the first item is the filter id.

result.description: Boolean - true if the filter was successfully uninstalled, otherwise false.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the filter id.

result.description: Array of log objects, or an empty array if nothing has changed since last poll. For new block filter, it will return array of block hashes. For pending transaction filter, it will return array of transaction hashes.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the filter id.

result.description: Array of log objects, or an empty array if nothing has changed since last poll. For new block filter, it will return array of block hashes. For pending transaction filter, it will return array of transaction hashes.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the filter options.

result.description: Priority fee to be included in a block.

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of these keyword "latest", "finalized", "safe", "earliest", and "pending"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block number.
Params array where the first item is the block hash.

oneOf.description: Block number in hex or one of these keywords "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block number.

result.description: List of transaction receipts in a given block

data.description: Optional, extra information or payload included with the transaction.

from.description: The address the transaction is sent from.

to.description: Optional, the address the transaction is directed to.

value.description: Optional, integer of the value sent with this transaction.

params.description: Transaction data

result.description: Filled transaction data with its RLP encoded form

oneOf.description: The address of the account to generate the proof for.
An array of storage keys (slots) to generate proofs for.
Block number in hex or one of these keywords "latest", "earliest", "pending", "safe", "finalized"

params.description: Params array where the first item is the address, the second item is array of storage keys, and the third item is the block number.

result.description: Merkle proof for the given account

data.description: Optional, extra information or payload included with the transaction.

from.description: Optional, the address the transaction is sent from.

to.description: Optional, the address the transaction is directed to.

value.description: Optional, integer of the value sent with this transaction.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the transaction data.

result.description: Access list and gas used for the transaction

oneOf.description: The number of blocks in the requested range.
The highest block number of the requested range, or 'latest' for the most recent block.

An optional array of percentile values (between 0 and 100) in ascending order. For each block in the requested range, the transactions are sorted by effective priority fee per gas, and the corresponding effective priority fee per gas at each percentile is returned.

params.description: Params array where the first item is the block count, the second item is the newest block number in the range, and the third item is reward percentiles array.

result.description: Fee history for the returned block range.
